events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor keeps proving he's one of the league’s top running backs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor runs for 3 touchdowns and Daniel Jones throws for 2 as Colts rout Raiders 40-6

events.name: New York Giants at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Spencer Rattler was so fired up by the sight of Rashid Shaheed hauling in his deep throw down the right sideline that the second-year quarterback started sprinting the length of the field to join the celebration.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints QB Spencer Rattler and coach Kellen Moore get 1st win over mistake-prone Giants, 26-14

events.name: Dallas Cowboys at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott had a makeshift offensive line in front of him against a team desperate for its first win and still marched the Dallas Cowboys up and down the field.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys dominate Jets 37-22 behind Prescott's 4 TD passes, two 90-yard scoring drives

headlines.description: — Sean Payton had a game ball in hand and stories to tell after he passed his mentor and friend Bill Parcells on the NFL career wins list. The pair of Super Bowl champion coaches caught up recently and shot the breeze, talking about playing tough road...
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos rally from 14-point deficit to hand Eagles their first loss of the season, 21-17

headlines.description: — Panthers coach Dave Canales preached to his players this past week about not allowing things to spiral out of control following a 29-point road loss to...
headlines.shortLinkText: Bryce Young, Rico Dowdle help Panthers rally from 17 points down to beat Dolphins 27-24

headlines.description: — In three previous matchups with Baltimore, C.J. Stroud had failed to lead Houston to an offensive touchdown, so when the Texans took the ball 67 yards in 10 plays for a TD on the game's first possession, that felt like a breakthrough in itself.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stroud throws for 4 touchdowns as the Texans blow out the battered Ravens 44-10

headlines.description: — Coach Brian Callahan has been adamant over the past few weeks that his Tennessee Titans could be a good team if the football started bouncing their way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans snap 10-game skid with improbable comeback to beat Cardinals 22-21

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — Lavonte David slid toward the middle of the field in anticipation as Buccaneers teammate Antoine Winfield Jr. pressured Seahawks quarterback Sam Darnold.
headlines.shortLinkText: David's pick sets up winning FG as Bucs beat Seahawks 38-35 in duel between Mayfield and Darnold

headlines.description: — David Montgomery had to wait nearly 10 years to play another football game in his hometown.
headlines.shortLinkText: David Montgomery dominates in his hometown as Lions beat Bengals 37-24

events.name: Washington Commanders at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Playing for the first time as a pro not far from his hometown, Jayden Daniels started slowly in his return after missing two games with an injured...
headlines.shortLinkText: Commanders rally from 10-0 deficit with 27 straight points to beat Chargers 27-10

events.name: New England Patriots at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Receiver Stefon Diggs is quite comfortable putting on a show in Buffalo. The big difference on Sunday night was doing so for the Bills’ division rival New England Patriots.
headlines.shortLinkText: Drake Maye leads Patriots to 23-20 win over Bills, leaving NFL without an unbeaten team
